title: Docker API build endpoint: images do not inherit labels from base image
body:
### Issue Description

When building images via Docker API the resultant image does not inherit labels from its parent.

This was introduced in 10d768baafef059288e609987045989a96cdc9ae.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Build an image using docker CLI `docker build ...` with Dockerfile starting `FROM image-with-labels`.
2. The resulting image does not have the labels from its base.

### Describe the results you received

The resulting image does not contains expected labels.

### Describe the results you expected

The resulting image should have labels from its base/parent.

comments.body: This 100% needs to be fixed before 5.5.0 final is released.
